texto: You ever get the feeling the world's filling up with bastards? I do. What I want to know is what happens when all the bastards run out of people to crap on? What happens when all that's left in the world is bastards? . . . The golden rule. Screw unto others before they screw unto you.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de William Hoffman que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “You ever get the feeling the world's filling up with bastards? I do. What I want to know is what …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, greed, human-nature, com foco em human-nature e misanthropy.
